name: Frost Touch
mechanics: Melee spell attack. 1d6 cold and the target's speed drops 10 ft until the end of its next turn. Scales with level.
narration_cue: Your hand closes and the cold bites deep — frost crackles across skin.

name: Arcane Bolt
mechanics: Ranged spell attack. 1d6 force + INT mod. Scales: 2d6 at L5, 3d6 at L11, 4d6 at L17.
narration_cue: A streak of raw arcane energy — crackling, colorless, fast.

name: Spark
mechanics: Ranged spell attack. 1d4 lightning and the target cannot take reactions until your next turn. Scales with level.
narration_cue: A snap of electricity leaps — brief, blinding, disorienting.

name: Prestidigitation
mechanics: Minor trick: light a candle, clean, warm or cool, or a small sensory effect. No combat use.
narration_cue: A flick of the wrist and the candles catch, or the mud slides from your boots.

name: Mage Light
mechanics: 20 ft of bright light plus 20 ft of dim light. No concentration.
narration_cue: Light blooms from your fingertip — warm, steady, obedient.

name: Shield Spell
mechanics: Reaction: +3 AC until the start of your next turn. Cast when attacked.
narration_cue: A shimmer of force snaps into existence — translucent, geometric, instant.

name: Detect Magic
mechanics: Sense the presence and school of magic. Reveals items, spells, enchantments, and wards. Concentration.
narration_cue: Everything touched by magic shimmers faintly, each with different light.

name: Mage Hand
mechanics: A spectral hand manipulates objects up to 10 lbs at range. It cannot attack.
narration_cue: A translucent hand materializes, fingers flexing with your intent.

name: Magic Missile
mechanics: Three darts auto-hit for 1d4+1 force each, split between targets as you choose. More darts at higher levels.
narration_cue: Darts of light streak out, each finding its mark with perfect inevitability.

name: Mist Step
mechanics: Teleport to a visible location, breaking line of sight. High Resonance for the cost — a local Veil tear.
narration_cue: You dissolve into a smear of light and reconstitute somewhere else.

name: Arcane Lock
mechanics: Magically seal a door or container; the force DC rises by 10. Bypassed by Expert Arcana or Master Sleight of Hand.
narration_cue: The magic sinks in — the lock clicks with finality beyond any key.

name: Elemental Burst
mechanics: Choose fire, ice, or lightning. DEX save in a 15 ft sphere. Fail: 2d6, half on success. L7: 3d6, L13: 4d6.
narration_cue: Fire erupts, ice crystallizes, or lightning arcs across the space.

name: Hold Person
mechanics: One humanoid makes a WIS save or is paralyzed; it re-saves each turn. Attacks against it have advantage. Concentration.
narration_cue: They freeze mid-motion, eyes still moving, mouth struggling.

name: Counterspell
mechanics: Reaction: INT check vs DC 10 + the enemy spell's Focus cost. Success negates the spell.
narration_cue: You feel the magic building and reach out to unravel it.

name: Dispel Magic
mechanics: End one spell or magical effect; higher-cost targets need an INT check vs DC 10 + cost. Reduces the target's Resonance by 2.
narration_cue: The spell collapses inward like a knot pulled free.

name: Fly
mechanics: A willing target gains a flying speed equal to its walking speed. Falls if concentration breaks. Concentration.
narration_cue: Your feet leave the ground — the air holds you.

name: Invisibility
mechanics: The target becomes invisible until it attacks or casts an offensive spell. Attacks against it have disadvantage. Concentration.
narration_cue: Light bends around you — first translucent, then gone.

name: Fireball
mechanics: A bead of flame detonates in a 20 ft sphere. DEX save, 3d6 fire on a fail, half on a success. L11: 4d6, L17: 5d6.
narration_cue: A bead of light detonates — heat, light, the roar of air consumed.

name: Lightning Bolt
mechanics: A 100 ft line. DEX save, 3d6 lightning on a fail, half on a success. Line shape rewards positioning. L11: 4d6, L17: 5d6.
narration_cue: Lightning erupts in a searing line — everything struck simultaneously.

name: Wall of Force
mechanics: An invisible, impassable wall or dome. Nothing passes and it cannot be dispelled. Concentration.
narration_cue: The air hardens. An absolute boundary.

name: Haste
mechanics: A willing target gains 2x speed, +2 AC, advantage on DEX saves, and an extra action. Ends: cannot move or act for 1 round. Concentration.
narration_cue: Time bends — they blur, existing faster than the world allows.

name: Slow
mechanics: Up to 3 creatures make a WIS save. Fail: speed halved, -2 AC, no reactions, one action or quick action. Re-save each turn. Concentration.
narration_cue: The air thickens — movements drag, thoughts struggle.

name: Arcane Eye
mechanics: An invisible sensor you see through, moving 30 ft/round and passing 1-inch gaps. Expert+ Arcana detects it. Concentration.
narration_cue: You close your eyes and open another — somewhere else, silent, watching.

name: Chain Lightning
mechanics: Primary target takes 4d6 lightning (DEX half), then it arcs to three others within 30 ft for 2d6 each. Cannot arc the same target.
narration_cue: Lightning strikes the first and leaps — finding the next body and the next.

name: Disintegrate
mechanics: Ranged spell attack. Hit: 5d6+20 force; if reduced to 0 HP the target is disintegrated, no death saves. Miss: nothing.
narration_cue: A thin green ray — where it touches, matter ceases. Absence.

name: Teleport
mechanics: Teleport yourself and up to four others to a previously visited location. Familiarity affects accuracy.
narration_cue: The world folds. An instant of being in both places.

name: Power Word: Stun
mechanics: If the target has 75 HP or fewer it is auto-stunned, CON save each turn. If it has more, the spell fails silently — the caster does not know.
narration_cue: A syllable that collapses thought. They stop. Everything stops.

name: Maze
mechanics: The target vanishes into an extradimensional maze, no initial save. INT check DC 20 each round to escape. Concentration.
narration_cue: Space opens beneath them — they fall into somewhere that shouldn't exist.

name: Meteor Swarm
mechanics: Four 20 ft spheres, DEX save each. Fail: 4d6 fire + 4d6 bludgeoning, half on a success. Areas can overlap.
narration_cue: The sky splits. Four streaks descend like the fists of an angry god.

name: Time Stop
mechanics: Time stops for everyone but you for 1d4+1 turns. Directly affecting another creature ends it. Preparation, not attack.
narration_cue: The world freezes mid-breath. Only you move, alone in a silent instant.

name: Sacred Flame
mechanics: WIS save, ignoring armor. 1d6 radiant + WIS mod. Scales: 2d6 at L5, 3d6 at L11, 4d6 at L17.
narration_cue: A pillar of golden light descends — not from the sky, but from somewhere beyond it.

name: Guiding Light
mechanics: The next attack roll against the marked target has advantage. No damage.
narration_cue: A faint halo settles over your ally's target — subtle, warm, marking them.

name: Mend
mechanics: Repair a single break or tear in an object. No combat application.
narration_cue: Your fingers trace the crack and the material remembers what it was.

name: Sacred Word
mechanics: Undead and Hollow within 10 ft take 1d4 radiant; living creatures are unaffected. Scales: 2d4 at L5, 3d4 at L11, 4d4 at L17.
narration_cue: You speak a word that has weight. The Hollow things recoil — not from sound, but from meaning.

name: Heal Wounds
mechanics: Restore 1d8 + WIS mod HP. The fundamental healing spell.
narration_cue: Warmth flows from your hands into the wound. Flesh knits. Color returns.

name: Shield of Faith
mechanics: Reaction: +2 AC to an ally when attacked, which may cause a miss retroactively.
narration_cue: A shimmer of golden force interposes itself — not your shield, but your god's.

name: Bless
mechanics: Up to three allies gain +1d4 on attack rolls and saving throws. Concentration.
narration_cue: You speak their names and your patron hears — warmth settling into bones.

name: Sanctuary
mechanics: Enemies must make a WIS save before attacking the target; on a fail they must choose a different target. Breaks if the protected creature attacks.
narration_cue: A quiet falls around them. Something about them makes violence feel wrong.

name: Detect Hollow
mechanics: Sense the presence, direction, and intensity of Hollow corruption within 60 ft. 0 Resonance — divine sensing stabilizes the Veil. Concentration.
narration_cue: Your perception shifts. Clean light where reality is whole, darkness where it frays.

name: Command
mechanics: A one-word command (Halt, Flee, Drop, Kneel, Approach). WIS save; on a fail the target obeys next turn. Won't obey directly harmful commands.
narration_cue: You speak one word with divine authority. The target's body obeys before their mind can object.

name: Turn Undead/Hollow
mechanics: Undead and Hollow make a WIS save or are frightened and flee for 1 min. At L5+, a creature with HP under 5x your level is destroyed.
narration_cue: You raise your holy symbol and divine light pours out. The unnatural things shriek and scatter.

name: Spiritual Weapon
mechanics: A spectral weapon themed to your patron attacks independently each round for 1d8 + WIS. No concentration.
narration_cue: A weapon forms from light and will — not yours, but your god's.

name: Dispel Corruption
mechanics: Remove Hollow corruption from an object, a 10 ft area, or a creature; ends stage 1 Hollowed. Stage 2+ needs Greater Restoration.
narration_cue: Your hand presses to the corruption and light flows in. The wrongness resists — then breaks.

name: Zone of Truth
mechanics: All creatures in a 15 ft radius make a CHA save or cannot deliberately lie for 10 minutes; they may be evasive. Affected creatures know it.
narration_cue: The air clears. Something in the space demands honesty — with the quiet insistence of a judge's gaze.

name: Prayer of Healing
mechanics: Out of combat only. Over 10 minutes, restore 2d8 + WIS mod HP to up to six creatures.
narration_cue: You kneel and pray. The divine warmth seeps in slowly — the steady warmth of being tended.

name: Beacon of Hope
mechanics: Up to three allies gain advantage on WIS and death saves, and any healing they receive restores maximum HP. Concentration.
narration_cue: Hope is not a feeling. It's a decision. Your prayer makes that decision easier.

name: Mass Heal
mechanics: Restore 2d8 + WIS mod HP to every ally within earshot. The benchmark group heal.
narration_cue: The light finds every wound, every bruise, every ache. Everyone feels it at once.

name: Divine Ward
mechanics: One ally gains resistance to all damage for 1 round as your patron interposes their will.
narration_cue: A shield that isn't a shield. The blow lands and seems diminished. Reduced. Judged insufficient.

name: Flame Strike
mechanics: DEX save in a 10 ft cylinder. Fail: 2d6 fire + 2d6 radiant, half on a success. The radiant half harms Hollow even if fire-resistant.
narration_cue: A column of fire falls from above — not natural fire. This burns with purpose.

name: Veil Ward
mechanics: Reinforce the Veil in a 30 ft radius: all Resonance halved, echo rolls +4, but spell damage -1 die and DCs -1.
narration_cue: The Veil's cracks close slightly. Magic here is safer. Weaker. Controlled.

name: Revivify
mechanics: Touch a creature dead within the last minute; it returns with 1 HP. Doesn't work on Hollow-killed. Requires a diamond, consumed.
narration_cue: You press your hand to the still chest and refuse the threshold. A gasp. A heartbeat. They're back.

name: Commune
mechanics: Contact your patron deity and ask three yes/no questions. The god answers truthfully but may answer 'unclear'.
narration_cue: The world falls away. You are alone with your god — vast, attentive, ancient.

name: Banishment
mechanics: A Hollow creature makes a CHA save or is sent beyond the Veil; held a full minute, it is permanent. Non-Hollow is banished to a demiplane for the duration. Concentration.
narration_cue: You point and speak with your god's voice. Reality opens beneath the creature — a rejection.

name: Greater Restoration
mechanics: Remove one curse, disease, ability drain, Hollowed condition (any stage), Charmed, or Petrified. The only reliable Hollowed cure.
narration_cue: Light that goes deeper than flesh — reaching into the pattern and straightening what was bent.

name: Resurrection
mechanics: Return a creature dead up to 10 days to life at full HP. A diamond is consumed. The soul must be willing; returns with 1 exhaustion.
narration_cue: This is negotiation with death itself. You reach across Mortaen's threshold and ask for them back.

name: Holy Aura
mechanics: Allies within 30 ft gain advantage on saves and impose disadvantage on attacks; undead/Hollow hitting in melee make a CON save or are blinded. Concentration.
narration_cue: Your god's presence fills the space — warm, golden, absolute.

name: Divine Judgment
mechanics: WIS save. Fail: 6d8 radiant + stunned 1 round, half and no stun on a success. Against Hollow the damage rises to 8d8.
narration_cue: Your god looks through your eyes. The judgment is instant, absolute, and searing.

name: Miracle
mechanics: Request divine intervention; the god decides. Can replicate any standard-or-lower spell at 0 Focus or produce unique domain effects. Once per session.
narration_cue: You pray — truly, desperately — and your god answers. What happens next is theirs, not yours.
audio_cue: Full STG-006 then deity audio then effect audio

name: Thorn Whip
mechanics: Melee spell attack at range. 1d6 piercing, pull the target 10 ft closer, + WIS mod. Scales: 2d6 at L5, 3d6 at L11, 4d6 at L17.
narration_cue: A vine lashes out — thorned, fast, hungry. It strikes and drags them toward you.

name: Druidcraft
mechanics: Minor nature effect: bloom a flower, a sensory effect, predict weather 24 hours, or light/snuff a small flame.
narration_cue: You whisper to the world and it responds — a flower opens, a breeze shifts.

name: Produce Flame
mechanics: Conjure flame in your hand for light, or hurl it as a ranged spell attack for 1d6 fire. Scales with level.
narration_cue: Fire blooms in your palm — drawn from the heat of the earth. It knows you.

name: Shillelagh
mechanics: A held staff or club becomes magical, uses WIS for attack and damage, and its damage die becomes 1d8.
narration_cue: You grip the staff and the wood responds — harder, heavier, alive.

name: Gust
mechanics: Push a creature 5 ft (STR save), push objects 10 ft, or create a harmless wind. Minor control or utility.
narration_cue: The air obeys — a sharp push, scattered leaves, a campfire bending wrong.

name: Healing Touch
mechanics: Restore 1d8 + WIS mod HP. Primal healing — the body remembers wholeness.
narration_cue: Your hand presses to the wound and the flesh remembers what it was.

name: Bark Skin
mechanics: Reaction: when hit, +2 AC for the rest of the round as skin hardens to bark.
narration_cue: Your skin darkens, hardens — bark spreading from the point of impact.

name: Entangle
mechanics: Vines erupt in a 20 ft square. STR save or restrained, re-save each turn; the area is difficult terrain. 0 Resonance in nature, 2 in urban. Concentration.
narration_cue: The ground opens and vines pour upward — thick, thorned, grasping.

name: Speak with Animals
mechanics: Communicate with animals for 10 minutes; they understand speech and answer within their intelligence. 0 Resonance.
narration_cue: The birdsong sharpens into meaning. The fox stops and really looks at you.

name: Goodberry
mechanics: Create five berries; each restores 1 HP and a full day's nourishment. 0 Resonance — growth magic.
narration_cue: You cup your hands and life gathers — five small berries, warm, faintly glowing.

name: Faerie Fire
mechanics: Creatures in a 20 ft cube make a DEX save or are outlined in light; they cannot be invisible and attacks against them have advantage. Concentration.
narration_cue: Drifting motes of cold light cling to everything, outlining bodies in eerie luminescence.

name: Call Lightning
mechanics: Outdoors, call a bolt for 2d8 lightning (DEX half); later rounds strike again for 2 Focus. 1 Resonance outdoors, 3 indoors. Concentration.
narration_cue: The sky answers. A pause, then a focused lance of light finds exactly what you pointed at.

name: Plant Growth
mechanics: Combat: a 100 ft radius becomes difficult terrain (4x movement). Non-combat: double crop yields over 8 hours. Near-zero Resonance in nature.
narration_cue: The forest surges. Every vine thickens, every root rises. The land becomes its own fortress.

name: Conjure Animals
mechanics: Summon 2 wolves, 1 bear, or 4 hawks that obey verbal commands and act on your turn. They vanish at 0 HP or when the duration ends. Concentration.
narration_cue: You call, and the wild answers — from the earth itself. Real, warm, willing.

name: Protection from Hollow
mechanics: Advantage on saves vs Hollow effects; Hollow creatures have disadvantage attacking the target. 0 Resonance — reinforces the Veil. Concentration.
narration_cue: You trace a pattern and the wrongness parts around them like water around stone.

name: Water Breathing
mechanics: Up to six creatures breathe underwater for 24 hours, and normally above water. No concentration.
narration_cue: You press their chest and their lungs expand — the water will be air to them now.

name: Nature's Grasp
mechanics: Reaction: an enemy moving through natural terrain near you is restrained by roots (STR save) until end of turn. 0 Resonance in nature.
narration_cue: The ground reaches up and grabs — with the patient, absolute grip of ancient roots.

name: Wild Shape
mechanics: Transform into a beast form with its own HP pool, natural attacks, and beast senses. Costs Focus and Stamina. No spellcasting in form until L10.
narration_cue: Bones shift. Skin ripples. One terrible, exhilarating moment of being neither — then something new.

name: Wall of Thorns
mechanics: A 60 ft thorn barrier; passing through deals 2d6 piercing (DEX half) and it gives full cover. 1 Resonance in forest, 3 in urban. Concentration.
narration_cue: A hedge of thorns thick as your arm, higher than a house, absolutely impassable.

name: Commune with Nature
mechanics: Learn three facts about the surrounding 3 miles: terrain, water, life, Hollow corruption, settlements, or powerful creatures. 0 Resonance.
narration_cue: You press palm to earth. The land speaks in impressions — water here, corruption there, something wrong to the north.

name: Blight
mechanics: CON save. Fail: 4d8 necrotic, half on a success. Plant creatures take max damage with no save. Higher Resonance — decay as a weapon.
narration_cue: You reach for the opposite of growth. The target withers — color draining, life pulled out like thread.

name: Guardian of Nature
mechanics: Choose Great Tree (+10 temp HP, advantage on CON saves and attacks, difficult terrain 15 ft) or Primal Beast (+10 ft speed, advantage on WIS, +1d6 force, darkvision 120 ft). Concentration.
narration_cue: Nature pours into you — bark hardening skin, or predator instinct sharpening every sense.

name: Ice Storm
mechanics: A 20 ft radius. DEX save, 2d8 bludgeoning + 2d6 cold on a fail, half on a success. The area becomes difficult terrain for a round.
narration_cue: The temperature drops. Fist-sized hail hammers everything below.

name: Earthquake
mechanics: All creatures in a 100 ft radius make a DEX save each round or fall prone and take 2d6. Structures take massive damage, fissures open, concentration breaks. 3 Resonance in nature, 5 urban. Concentration.
narration_cue: The earth moves. The ground buckles, cracks, rises and falls like a breathing thing.

name: Tsunami
mechanics: A 300 ft wall advances 50 ft/round. STR save, 3d8 bludgeoning and carried on a fail, half and not carried on a success. Requires nearby water. Concentration.
narration_cue: The ocean rises. Not a wave — a wall. It hangs, then comes for everything.

name: Regenerate
mechanics: Restore 4d8+15 HP immediately, then 1 HP per round for an hour, regrowing severed limbs over the full duration.
narration_cue: Life flows in and doesn't stop — the body repairs with the patience of a forest regrowing after fire.

name: Animal Shapes
mechanics: Transform up to six willing creatures into beast forms (max CR = level/4), each with its own beast HP. Concentration.
narration_cue: You speak beast names and allies hear the call in their bones. One by one they change.

name: Feeblemind
mechanics: INT save. Fail: INT and CHA drop to 1; the target cannot cast, use magic items, or understand language. Save repeats every 30 days. Only Greater Restoration ends it.
narration_cue: You reach into their mind and pull. Not a thought — the capacity for thought.

name: Storm of Vengeance
mechanics: A 360 ft storm escalates each round: deafen, acid 1d6, lightning 3d6 to six, hail 2d6, then a blizzard of difficult terrain and 1d6 cold. Concentration.
narration_cue: You give the sky permission. What follows is weather with intent.
audio_cue: Building storm: wind, rain, thunder, hail, blizzard
